name: prompt closed-loop step audit-trail records every loop step into the merkle-chained audit log
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/closed-loop-test.sh" --step audit-trail --prompt-id x --audit-log compliance/audit.log --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"event":"prompt-loop-step"' compliance/audit.log && grep -q '"prompt_id":"x"' compliance/audit.log && echo ok 1>&2
